pi_items.source: FTC official press releases and document metadata. The official title appears as 'Merger Guidelines [2023]' in the PDF document and 'Merger Guidelines 2023' on the FTC reports page.

pi_items.verified_value: Federal Trade Commission (joint with Department of Justice)
pi_items.source: FTC press release dated December 18, 2023: 'Federal Trade Commission and Justice Department Release 2023 Merger Guidelines'. The document is authored jointly by both agencies.
The official FTC website (ftc.gov) is titled 'Federal Trade Commission' across all pages. The 2023 Merger Guidelines are published on https://www.ftc.gov/reports/merger-guidelines-2023.

Multiple authoritative sources confirm the release date as December 18, 2023. The official PDF filename is '2023_merger_guidelines_final_12.18.2023.pdf' and the FTC press release is dated December 18, 2023.

The 2023 Merger Guidelines are published on the official FTC website at ftc.gov domain. Primary URLs include: https://www.ftc.gov/reports/merger-guidelines-2023 and https://www.ftc.gov/system/files/ftc_gov/pdf/2023_merger_guidelines_final_12.18.2023.pdf

privileged_info_summary: The 2023 Merger Guidelines are a real, publicly available document jointly issued by the Federal Trade Commission and the Department of Justice on December 18, 2023. The official title is '2023 Merger Guidelines' (also published as 'Merger Guidelines [2023]' and 'Merger Guidelines 2023'). The document is authored by the Federal Trade Commission (jointly with DOJ) and is hosted on the Federal Trade Commission's official website at ftc.gov. The document replaces all prior versions of the agencies' merger guidelines, including the 2010 Horizontal Merger Guidelines and the 2020 Vertical Merger Guidelines, and serves as the framework for the FTC's merger-review analysis.
